US NFP and BoC policy divergence likely to drive 1–2% volatility swings

FX.comment: Break above 149.20 confirms bullish continuation; confluence at 160.00 offers asymmetric reward

STOCKS.title: S&P 500 Bearish Momentum Accelerates as Fundamental Headwinds Mount
tldr_points: Persistent 'Trump Slump' driven by policy uncertainty weighs on market sentiment.
Record US household equity exposure increases vulnerability to corrections.
Surge in oil prices adds inflation pressure, prompting hawkish Fed expectations.
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 nears key support as Trump slump, household leverage, and oil inflation weigh. Technicals show breakdown.
STOCKS.comment: Fundamental catalysts and technical breakdown signal further downside.
